title: Chip supply to stay constrained 'beyond 2027,' Micron executives say

title: AI chatbots show left-wing bias, bombshell report finds; ChatGPT gives lefty answers 80% of time
description: Artificial-intelligence chatbots show a strongly left-leaning political bias – contrary to what leading AI companies claim, according to a bombshell report.

title: Thailand data usage beats global average

title: WaPo: Most AI Chatbots Lean Left on Politics
description: According to a Washington Post analysis that examined some of the industry's most widely used AI models, several widely used artificial intelligence chatbots were more likely to produce responses categorized as left-leaning than right-leaning when answering political questions.

title: Eli Lilly dives into hair loss treatments with investment in AI startup Absci
description: The deal is centered around Absci's early-stage hair loss drug ABS-201, which it designed using artificial intelligence tools.
content:
